content.en:
Ye Tian is a member of the Nine Extremes Alliance, and it doesn't matter which country he stays in, it doesn't matter much.

He still stayed in Luoxia Pavilion, occasionally going to the Demon Seed Abyss to find resources, and then exchanging them for resources that would help him refine the Eternal Dao Body.

As the years passed, his eternal Dao body naturally gradually ascended.

However, what he has cultivated is the Eternal Dao Seed, and it is naturally very difficult to complete the Eternal Dao Body, but it is safe, there is no risk of demon seeding, and the strength of the increase is even stronger, of course he is extremely satisfied.

this day.

The Nine Extremes Alliance sent a reward, a reward for his assistance in exposing the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom.

Of course, these rewards were not paid by the Nine Extremes Alliance, but were taken from the treasury of the Ancient Lord.

The Lord of the Ancient Kingdom was executed, and his treasure trove of resources belonged to the Nine Extremes Alliance, and a part of it was taken out as a reward, and the Nine Extremes Alliance earned it instead!

"There are really a lot of treasures!"

Ye Tian said happily.

There are dozens of precious resources, and even those that are useful for the transformation of the Eternal Dao Body, as well as six Eternal Dao Divine Weapons, and three Eternal Primordial Treasures.

"Compared to the true treasure trove of the Ancient Lord, this item is definitely the tip of the iceberg, but the Nine Extremes Alliance can give me so much, it's already very good!"

Ye Tian sorted out these treasures, and also studied the three eternal original treasures.

But for a while, I didn't study and understand, so I still asked the internal members of the Nine Extremes Alliance to identify it.

There must be an Eternal Primordial Treasure in the Nine Extremes Alliance that has an identification effect, and that Eternal Primordial Treasure can identify other Eternal Primordial Treasures.

And Ye Tian's identification eye, the level is too low, it is only an innate primordial treasure, and it is impossible to identify the eternal primordial treasure.

Soon, the identification of the three Eternal Primordial Treasures was completed.

Ghost Armor, Eternal Primordial Treasure, can enhance defense, can accelerate one-tenth of the Eternal Dao body transformation speed

Shadow Statue, Eternal Primordial Treasure, can improve comprehension and accelerate cultivation speed

[Yuan Explosion Dao Bead, which can be urged by the Eternal Dao Species, explodes extremely strong combat effectiveness, and the defect is that it will lose the Eternal Dao Seed and expand the defects of the Eternal Dao Species. 】

"These three Eternal Primordial Treasures should be Eternal Primordial Treasures selected by the Ninth Order Alliance and have little value. However, this Yuan Explosion Dao Bead has helped me a lot, and I am not afraid of damaging the Eternal Dao Species!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In short, he is still very excited about this reward.

Unconsciously, tens of millions of years of eternal solstice have passed.

During this period of time, there were many killings between the Eternal Dao Realm in the Gu Yun Realm, many Eternal Dao Realm fell, and even more Eternal Dao powerhouses fell.

However, under the protection of Ye Tian, Luoxia Pavilion naturally had no problems, but it had grown a lot, and many Mythical Dao Realm and Eternal Dao powerhouses had joined Luoxia Pavilion.

"The eternal Dao body has been transformed, and it is sixty percent of the realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this rate, it wouldn't be long before he could completely complete the Eternal Dao Body.

At that time, his strength will definitely skyrocket.

this day.

The Nine Pole Alliance's internal trade fair is about to start, and it was notified in advance.

"The internal trade fair of the Nine Poles Alliance, there should be a lot of good things to be traded, it is said that Qin He and other high-level officials will take out some treasures for auction, and they need to gather some Nine Pole points!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian entered the abyss of the demon seed again.

This time, he condensed multiple replica bodies, frantically collected resources in the Demon Seed Abyss, and brought the Yuan Explosion Dao Bead.

......

Demon Seed Abyss.

Deeper.

After a period of time, Ye Tian finally found a place that gave birth to a lot of resources.

However, he also encountered a very powerful demon seed.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian fought against this demon seed, and his strength was completely crushed.

Then.

He urged the Yuan Explosion Dao Bead, and the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed made the effect of the Yuan Explosion Dao Bead explode to the extreme.

Rumble!!!!!

Gradually, he was able to completely contend with the demonic seed.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian fought with this demon seed again and again, while the other copy body took the opportunity to hurry away and took away the resources and treasures here.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian left here, and he didn't try to kill this demon seed, no matter how explosive he was, he still couldn't kill this demon seed.

Time flies.

Ye Tian gradually gathered a lot of resources in the Demon Seed Abyss, but he also lost a lot of copy bodies.

this day.

Before the start of the Nine Extremes Alliance's internal trade fair, Ye Tian's copy body rushed back and traded most of the resources in exchange for a large number of Nine Pole Points.

"Three hundred and sixty thousand points, the number is not bad, maybe not as good as the top Eternal Dao Realm of the Nine Extremes Alliance, but it is also very good, if you encounter a suitable treasure, take the opportunity to bid for it. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon after.

The Nine Extremes Alliance's internal trade fair has begun, and the location is located in the realm of the gods.

Since it involves physical transactions, all the Eternal Dao Realms who want to participate in the auction rush to the realm of the gods.

If you don't want to participate in the auction, you can participate virtually in the Nine Extremes Void, just watching, and not participating.

......

Kingdom of the Gods.

Ye Tian traveled through one country after another, and finally arrived here, coming to the capital of the Kingdom of All Gods.

The people who came to participate in the Nine Extremes Alliance's internal trade fair 033 were all members of the Nine Extremes Alliance, and the powerhouses of other forces in the outside world were not qualified to participate in such a trade fair.

Here he met the river of snow.

And many members are also meeting each other for the first time in reality.

Trading floors.

One by one, the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm arrived, and they were all looking forward to the start of the fair.

The first part of the trade fair is to trade with each other, and the second link is the auction.

Of course.

Trading with each other, the price is easy to negotiate and not good, it is better to trade in the Nine Extremes Void!

And the really good things still hope to be sold at the auction, so that the bidding is more eternal to the Dao realm, and they can be sold at a high price.

If you trade privately, it is difficult to sell at a high price.

This is also one of the reasons why you can't usually buy good things.

I saw a name of Eternal Dao Realm constantly exchanging, but there were very few transactions.

After a while, the first part is over, and the second part is the auction part.

At this time, the auctioneer designated by the Nine Poles Alliance came to the stage and began the auction process.

I saw that the first auction item was taken out, attracting the attention of many Eternal Dao Realms.

"The first auction item, Eternal Cloud Liquid, can reduce the probability of Eternal Dao Seed Demonization, and it has an effect on all Dao Species. "

"The starting price is 2000 Jiuji points!".
